themes.name: Thinking is a tool
themes.description: Users had to shift from treating Claude as always immediately acting to seeing deliberate reasoning modes as something to invoke, tune, or disable depending on task complexity.

themes.name: Context is managed
themes.description: Users had to learn that context is a limited working resource shaped by memory, resumes, branches, PDFs, file references, and cache behavior rather than an invisible infinite conversation.

themes.name: Permission is policy
themes.description: Users had to move from one-off approvals toward durable project, team, plugin, MCP, and command rules that define what the agent is allowed to do.

themes.name: Agents are delegatable teammates
themes.description: Users had to understand that work can be split across custom subagents, skills, isolated worktrees, background tasks, and teammate-style workflows instead of staying in one linear chat.

themes.name: The workspace is configurable
themes.description: Users had to see Claude Code less as a fixed CLI and more as a personal and organizational environment shaped by settings, keybindings, hooks, status lines, plugins, and managed policies.

themes.name: Sessions are durable workspaces
themes.description: Users had to internalize that conversations can be resumed, branched, renamed, remotely controlled, backgrounded, and navigated as ongoing work records rather than disposable terminal exchanges.

themes.name: Tools must be designed for agents
themes.description: Users had to shift from exposing arbitrary commands or integrations to building agent-friendly tools with clear schemas, authentication, diagnostics, and predictable behavior.

themes.name: Autonomy needs boundaries
themes.description: Users had to learn that faster and more automatic modes are useful only when paired with explicit user instructions, review points, permission levels, and stop conditions.

themes.name: Reliability is observable
themes.description: Users had to treat diagnostics, transcripts, usage tracking, progress messages, health checks, and error surfacing as part of normal operation, not only as debugging aids.

themes.name: Claude Code spans surfaces
themes.description: Users had to adapt from a terminal-only model to a system that crosses VS Code, remote sessions, web and mobile control, Windows and PowerShell, cloud providers, and external connectors.
